01

About Me

I’m Trevour Sithole, a final-year BSc Computer Science with Mathematics student at North-West University, based in Pretoria, Gauteng. I live at the intersection of data, mathematics, and creativity.

My academic journey has given me a strong foundation in algorithms, Mathematics modelling, and software engineering. I’m driven by extracting insight from complex datasets — through machine learning models, scalable pipelines, or compelling visualisations.

Beyond code, I’m a Private School Amapiano producer — one of South Africa’s most distinctive sub-genres. As Trevour_Sithole, I release music internationally with over 10,000 monthly listeners across Spotify, Apple Music, TIDAL, and Amazon Music.

NameTrevour Sithole

02

Music

Under the name Trevour_Sithole, I produce Private School Amapiano — the refined, soulful, jazz-infused sub-genre redefining South Africa’s dance music scene. My sound blends deep piano progressions, spiritual harmonies, and infectious rhythms.

Key releases include Soul to Souls (2024 album), the collaborative Very Private, Very Mature with Gron (Soul Army Music, 2025), and recent singles featuring collaborators like TCM and Double Gee.

Music is my creative outlet and proof that discipline in one craft elevates all others.

04

Education

BSc Computer Science with Mathematics
North-West University · Mafikeng Campus
A rigorous four-year programme combining the theoretical foundations of computer science with applied mathematics. Key areas: algorithms & data structures, database systems, software engineering, machine learning, statistical inference, numerical analysis, and linear algebra.
AlgorithmsData StructuresMachine LearningMathematical ModellingDatabasesLinear Algebra
2023–
2026
● Final Year
05

Projects

// 01
In Progress
Exploratory Data Analysis — SA Census
In-depth EDA on South African demographic data uncovering trends in education, employment, and income distribution. Interactive visualisations with Plotly and a structured Jupyter report.
PythonPandasPlotlyJupyter
View on GitHub →
// 02
In Progress
Student Performance Predictor
ML model predicting academic outcomes based on attendance, study hours, and socioeconomic indicators. Trained with logistic regression and random forest classifiers.
Scikit-learnPythonNumPyFlask
View on GitHub →
// 03
In Progress
SQL Analytics Dashboard
Relational database schema for a mock retail business. Analytical queries and a Power BI dashboard surfacing KPIs including revenue trends, inventory turnover, and customer segmentation.
SQLPostgreSQLPower BI
View on GitHub →
// 04
Future
Research Project
Honours-level research exploring data pipeline architectures and scalable ingestion strategies, investigating real-time vs batch processing trade-offs using modern tooling.
Apache SparkPythonDockerAirflow
View on GitHub →
06

Let’s Connect

Looking for Remote internship, and entry-level opportunities in data science and data engineering. Also open to music collabs and placements. If you’re building something interesting — let’s talk.
